nasb.text: The conclusion, when all has been heard, is: fear God and keep His commandments, because this applies to every person.

esv.text: The end of the matter; all has been heard. Fear God and keep his commandments, for this is the whole duty of man.

cnv.text: 你們一切都聽見了，總而言之，應當敬畏　神，謹守他的誡命，因為這是每一個人的本分。

ccb.text: 以上所说的，总而言之，就是要敬畏上帝，遵守祂的诫命，这是人的本分。

csbs.text: 听完了这一切，结论就是：当敬畏神，谨守他的诫命，因为这是每一个人的本份。
